title: elodes virginica var. japonica
intro: Elodes virginica var. japonica, also known as Elsholtzia ciliata, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Elsholtzia ciliata include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Elsholtzia ciliata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
